comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Epic plan-review: PASS (signed, llm_ran). Triage of 17 advisories: (1) P5/G4 'siblings share decide.py + REVIEW_RESULT sidecar with no ordering edge' — resolved by landing as a DEPENDENCY-ORDERED stacked Gerrit change: #4 G5 -> #1 plan-impact (adds impact_fn to pass3_decide) -> #2 recall -> #5 thresholds -> #6 code-impact (reuses impact_fn) -> #7 nit/detector -> #8 data-capture -> #3 rollout. decide.py touched by #1 then #6 in that order; sidecar schema (impact_model_version + tier-tagged sub-answers) coordinated across #1/#6/#8/#3 so the extensions compose additively. (2) T11 'no versioning/migration for impact() change + new artifact' — addressed by #3's impact_model_version tag (version-segmented replay, refuses to pool old/new). (3) T3/G4 crit 'child6 PAT push confirmed working' + SSM-failure degradation — #8 implements the code+infra; the on-box PAT canary is an operational/deploy-time verification I cannot exercise from this worktree (noted as a deploy caveat, not a code gap). (4) E1/COH/G5 dedup/altitude nits — cosmetic; children are correctly parented + individually reviewable.

comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body:
=== EPIC STATUS / HANDOFF (session pause) ===
Worktree: .claude/worktrees/foliaged-merry-collie, branch worktree-foliaged-merry-collie, ff'd to origin/main c005f242b then 4 stack commits on top. venv + pre-commit + Gerrit commit-msg hooks installed. Identity RebarBotNava <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>.

DONE (4/8) — implemented, unit-tested, committed; pre-commit lint+mypy green; plan-review PASS+signed; NOT closed (close deferred to Gerrit Verified per CLAUDE.local.md):
  a23963ca3  #4 spangly-beggarly-blackrhino  (G5 deterministic decomposition signal)
  29d9fa863  #1 fishable-apivorous-redhead    (plan-review MAX impact + per-gate impact_fn seam)
  068ba1842  #2 disused-unpoliced-solenodon   (Pass-1 recall via post-Pass-1 candidates)
  23581b171  #5 usable-chattery-coelacanth    (threshold/posture recalibration)  <- stack TIP

TODO (4/8), all still OPEN:
  #6 albite-lazy-barb   — plan fully specified + remediated to 0-or-1 blocks; round-6 stack-grounded review in flight (job tmp rp_codeimpact6.txt). Ready to claim+implement.
  #7 grusome-uncheerful-nematode — plan needs mechanism rewrite; detector needs a BESPOKE seam (see its comment); recommend splitting off the detector as discovered_from.
  #8 limestone-unethical-zebrafinch — infra + change-scoped code_review artifact; the on-box PAT-push canary is a deploy step (un-verifiable here).
  #3 raptorial-galloping-dragon — rollout + calibration; depends on #1/#6/#8; implement LAST.

CRITICAL GOTCHA (stacked-review grounding): plan-review/completion gates ground against a snapshot of REBAR_GATE_REF>[snapshot].ref>origin/main. Default origin/main does NOT contain my stack, so children referencing prior-stack symbols (e.g. #6 uses impact_fn from #1) get FALSE 'symbol absent' BLOCKS. FIX: run each stacked child's review AND claim (and later completion-verify/close) with REBAR_GATE_REF=<current stack tip SHA> (attested+signable). Use the SAME ref for a child's review and its claim (verified_at_sha must equal current at claim). #7 is stack-independent (ground vs origin/main, no REBAR_GATE_REF).

Durable trail: session_log 'speedful-healthful-beagle' has the full blow-by-blow incl. each child's design + the gate findings caught (ADR-0008 independence violation, trigger_likelihood collision, grep-ast fabrication). Each child ticket has a STATUS(handoff) comment.

comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Container epic: all 8 child stories are closed + completion-certified, and their commits (Gerrit changes 399-406, each LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1) reference the child tickets. The epic's aggregate file_impact is delivered entirely through those children; there is no dedicated epic commit by design.". Session: 073933565.

compiled_state.description:
## Context
A full re-examination of the plan-review and code-review blocking gates (session logs under this
program; see ideas `neat-sooty-termite`/c34d and `revealable-voracious-groundhog`/8214) established,
with data from 681 plan-review sidecars + the Gerrit code-review corpus + Sonnet-scored simulations
and held-out adjudication, that: (a) plan-review's current blocking set is sound but its 0.70 bar is
too high for several load-bearing criteria and its blocking set should expand; (b) the shared
`impact = mean(severity attributes)` model dilutes high-severity findings below the bar and, for
code-review, structurally mis-measures maintainability/latent-regression findings; (c) verdict-flip
is a finder-recall problem, not a false-positive problem. This epic implements the converged fixes.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] All approved plan-review threshold/posture changes land (the pre-redesign recalibration).
- [ ] Both impact-model redesigns (plan-review AND code-review) implemented per the converged design.
- [ ] Code-review results are captured into the rebar ticket store (change-scoped, PAT-credentialed).
- [ ] New impact models ship at permissive thresholds with a calibration harness accumulating the
      corpus needed to tune the blocking thresholds down over time.
- [ ] Every child closes with plan-review + completion-verifier passing.

## Approved plan-review threshold / posture changes (pre-redesign; must be included)
- Lower `block_threshold` 0.70 -> 0.60 for the criteria with block-worthy findings stranded in the
  0.60-0.70 band: **COH, E2, F1, G5, G6, T5e**.
- Keep **T4 @ 0.70** (its band findings were fail-safe migrations).
- Promote to blocking (`default_posture: blocking`): **G1G2 @0.70, T1 @0.70, T8 @0.70** (100%
  block-worthy at the would-block slice) and **E4 @0.75** (0.75 excludes its one borderline).
- **E1, T3** stay advisory (no threshold reaches 100% block-worthy; revisit later); **A1** stays advisory.
- Ship the **deterministic G5 decomposition signal** and **Pass-1 finding-memory** (recall) — both approved.

## Both impact redesigns (must be included)
- **Plan-review impact** (idea c34d): replace the diluting mean with severity-first **MAX + hard
  override** (any of unverifiable-AC / uncertifiable-DoD / undecomposed / divergent-impl -> auto-high),
  plus a **detection amplifier** (silent-vs-self-revealing, DoD-uncertifiable). No new axes.
- **Code-review impact** (idea 8214): a code-review-specific, verifier-embedded model — two lanes
  (**prod/correctness x likelihood-of-firing** and **maintainability x change-frequency floor**),
  each lane = **MAX over tier-tagged binary consequence questions** (carved with charitable carve-outs),
  a **reversibility det/hybrid floor**, a **detection amplifier**, and a **re-anchored scale**;
  dispatched per-gate off the shared `decide.py` kernel (no added LLM calls; Pass-2 is one aggregate call).

## Scope (children — discrete deliverables)
1. Plan-review threshold + posture recalibration (config + tests).
2. Deterministic G5 decomposition signal.
3. Plan-review Pass-1 finding-memory (recall).
4. Plan-review impact redesign (MAX + override + detection; per-gate impact dispatch).
5. Code-review impact model redesign (two-lane tier-tagged; re-anchoring; per-gate dispatch).
6. Code-review data capture to the ticket store (change-scoped code_review artifact; PAT + persistent store; emission).
7. Code-review near-term nit reduction + new-behavior-without-test landmine detector.
8. Permissive rollout + calibration harness (corpus accumulation; offline replay + diff-grounded A/B tuning).

## Out of scope
- "Deeper" impact-aggregation reworks beyond the specified models remain parked in ideas c34d/8214.
- Retention/pruning of code-review artifacts (deliberately unbounded for now; revisit if it bites).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The approved plan-review threshold/posture table above is applied in
      `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/criteria_routing.json` with tests.
- [ ] Deterministic G5 signal + Pass-1 finding-memory landed.
- [ ] Plan-review impact redesign landed (mean replaced by MAX/override/detection).
- [ ] Code-review impact redesign landed (two-lane tier-tagged model, re-anchored, per-gate dispatch).
- [ ] Code-review data capture landed and confirmed writing to `tickets` from the reviewbot.
- [ ] Near-term nit reduction + landmine detector landed.
- [ ] Rollout + calibration harness landed; new models ship permissive.
- [ ] All children closed with passing plan-review + completion-verifier.
compiled_state.title: Review-gate impact redesign + threshold re-tune (plan-review + code-review)
